creator: sahil@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is likely related to the net-mgmt/net-snmp problem that was fixed
with a commit on 26 Apr 2010.  Please update your ports tree and try to
build zabbix-server.  Let me know if that resolves your problem so we
can close this PR.  Also see ports/141238 for context.

-- 
Sahil Tandon <sahil@FreeBSD.org>
